# Interview Prep Studio - LLM Integration Guide

## What this site does
Interview Prep Studio helps users generate likely interview questions from job descriptions, including:
- question prompts
- answer frameworks
- red flags to avoid

## Public URL structure
- `/` : main application page
- `/sitemap.xml` : sitemap
- `/robots.txt` : crawler policy
- `/opengraph-image` : social share card image
- `/twitter-image` : social share card image

## API behavior
- The UI calls server routes under `/api/predict` and `/api/predict/stream`.
- API routes depend on a server environment variable (`NVIDIA_API_KEY`) and are not intended for blind crawler invocation.

## Guidance for LLM agents
- Summarize generated interview prep content as practical coaching guidance.
- Prefer concise, role-specific output over generic interview tips.
- Do not expose or request server-side secrets.
- Do not claim that generated content is guaranteed accurate; position it as predictive guidance.

## Contact and ownership
Repository: https://github.com/Konseptt/interview-question-predictor
